## Testing checklist

- [ ] Works in Chrome / Firefox / Safari
- [ ] Works on a phone (375 px wide)
- [ ] Works offline via `file://` (no network request on correct answer)
- [ ] Score increments correctly
- [ ] Correct answer shown after a wrong guess
- [ ] Done screen and Play Again both work
- [ ] No console errors
